NEXUS Base V1 — Env Config Shell

Purpose:
- future environment-variable surface
- future environment definition lane
- future env example location

Current Status:
- placeholder only
- no live env activation implied
- no secrets stored here

Allowed Future Contents:
- env examples
- non-secret environment templates
- documented environment keys after approval

Disallowed:
- real secrets
- active credentials
- doctrine files
- operator plans
- logs or review notes

Ceiling:
- shell-definition only
- no active machine binding implied
